HGSS.450.0000:
Welcome to Trainer House, the newest
and most happening place in Viridian.\r
We’re open to Trainers only.\f
You can battle against the best
of the best right downstairs.
HGSS.450.0001:
Viridian is the town closest to
Indigo Plateau.\f
They built this place because so
many Trainers pass through on their\r
way up to Indigo Plateau.
HGSS.450.0002:
They hold practice battles
downstairs here.\f
I would love to see how well a
Trainer from Johto battles.
HGSS.450.0003:
You go all over the place and battle
all kinds of Trainers.\f
This is not just to train your Pokémon.
This is also a chance to experience\r
many things yourself.\f
I bet the Champion from
Pallet Town went to all the\r
cities and towns in Kanto.
HGSS.450.0004:
Whew...\f
I’m taking a rest from
Pokémon battles.
HGSS.450.0005:
Practice battles are held in the
Training Hall downstairs.\f
Skilled Trainers are invited to
participate.\f
Communicate with your friends through
the Pokéwalker to bring them here!\f
Be aware that you cannot bring them
here once you are downstairs!
HGSS.450.0006:
Trainer House Rules\f
1. You can challenge various Trainers
    once a day.\f
2. All Pokémon over Level 50 become
    Level 50 for the battle.\f
3. You cannot use items from your Bag.\f
4. Afterward, your Pokémon will recover
    and the held item will be restored.\f
5. You cannot earn experience from
    the battle.\f
6. You earn Battle Points instead!\f
Skilled Trainers are invited to
participate.
HGSS.450.0007:
...What’s this?
A strategy memo?\f
This writing looks like ONIX tracks...\r
It’s completely illegible...
